titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Kurduwayh Al-Hamadani

text: و ما كان فيه عن كردويه الهمدانيّ‌ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن كردويه الهمدانيّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Kurduwayh Al-Hamadani has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Kurduwayh Al-Hamadani.
